chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Suit No. B–11 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.3526/2025. 2. For orders on CMA No.3498/2025. 29.09.2025 Syed Yasser Ali, Advocate for the plaintiff-bank a/w attorney of the plaintiff namely Zubair Ahmed son of Manzoor Ahmed Dayo. Mr. Akber Sohail, Advocate for the defendants-customers a/w attorney of the defendants namely Adnan son of Abdul Ghaffar. ------------------------------- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. The plaintiff-bank has filed this application for withdrawal of the suit. Initially, when the said withdrawal application was filed, the withdrawal was subject to Master Restructuring Agreement (MRA), however, on further consideration the parties’ counsel and their representatives present in Court have amended the reference to MRA by striking through the text referring to MRA in the prayer clause of the said application as well as endorsing their signatures on the side margin. The counsel for defendants- customers has given his no objection as well as the attorney of the defendants. It is acknowledged by the attorneys of the plaintiff-bank and the defendants-customers that the corporate seal is / was not readily available when the said application was amended in Court. Accordingly, the application is allowed in the above terms and the suit stands disposed of as withdrawn alongwith all pending applications subject to all its legal implications. s s s J U D G E Asif
